rows.label: qev065406_MSG0001
rows.name:
............You heard
everything, didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0002
rows.name:
Yes. I am a Definian sent in
as a spy for the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0003
rows.name:
Shortly after NLA was built, I
replaced a human named Suriella
who lost her life during the chaos,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0004
rows.name:
And since then, I have been
living my life as an Earthling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0005
rows.name:
In other words, all of the Suriella
since NLA was built has been me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0006
rows.name:
Since becoming Suriella, I have
only borrowed the form of
another human a single time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0007
rows.name:
That was just recently... The Clemons
you met in the Commercial Area. That
was me who had changed my form.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0008
rows.name:
In order to let you know that the
Clemons who trapped you was a fake...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0009
rows.name:
And in order to create the time
for me to confront Dieara, who
had borrowed Clemons's form.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0010
rows.name:
I was the one who guided you
to the location where the
real Clemons's corpse was.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0011
rows.name:
As for why I did such a thing... It is
all exactly as Dieara said earlier.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0012
rows.name:
Through my life with the Earthlings, for
the first time, I learned the joy of
being an individual endowed with life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0013
rows.name:
To say it in the Earthling way... I
ended up learning the joy of living.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0014
rows.name:
As a result... I came to hold doubts about
the mission bestowed upon me by the Growth
...and even began to consider betrayal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0015
rows.name:
However............ this is all nothing more
than an excuse. The fact that I was a spy
for the Growth is an undeniable truth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0016
rows.name:
At the very least, for my final
moments, allow me to receive
punishment as an Earthling...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_JNK0010
rows.name: Punish

rows.label: qev065406_SEL0011
rows.name: Capture her as a criminal.

rows.label: qev065406_JNK0020
rows.name: Overlook

rows.label: qev065406_SEL0021
rows.name: Let her go just like this.

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0017
rows.name:
I am sorry... I have caused
you so much trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0018
rows.name:
I am grateful to be given
punishment in the Earthling way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Ridiculous, you say
you will overlook me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0020
rows.name: You are... quite cruel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0021
rows.name:
Even though... there is no longer
any place for me to return to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0022
rows.name: Okaaay, that's enough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0023
rows.name:
I feel bad interrupting while you two
were having various discussions, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0024
rows.name:
I'll be taking custody of the
matters regarding this Definian.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0025
rows.name:
Don't misunderstand, okay? I'm
not being swayed by emotion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0026
rows.name:
There are still many unknowns regarding the
aliens called Definians on our end, so I
just thought we could make use of her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0027
rows.name:
The subsequent treatment will
be decided after consulting
with Commander Vandham.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0028
rows.name:
You have no complaints, right? Even if
you do, I won't let you voice them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Alright, then I'll take
custody of this Definian.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0030
rows.name:
Well... I am grateful for your
work. I'll report to the higher-ups
that you played a massive role.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0031
rows.name:
And... I won't let things end
poorly for this Definian either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0032
rows.name: So just trust me on this... alright![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065406_MSG0033
rows.name:
Well then, good work on the mission!
Let's definitely have a date next time![ST:wait ]
